PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?winner ?winnerLabel ?occupation ?occupationLabel WHERE {
  ?winner p:P166 ?statement .
  ?statement ps:P166 wd:Q160082 .
  ?statement pq:P585 ?awardDate .
  FILTER(YEAR(?awardDate) >= 2014 && YEAR(?awardDate) <= 2023)
  .
  ?winner wdt:P106 ?occupation .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?winner rdfs:label ?winnerLabel
    FILTER(LANG(?winnerLabel) = 'en')
  }
  OPTIONAL {
    ?occupation rdfs:label ?occupationLabel
    FILTER(LANG(?occupationLabel) = 'en')
  }
}
